title: eriocoma mollissima
intro: Eriocoma mollissima, also known as the silky woollyhead, is a plant species belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and soothe skin irritations. The health benefits of Eriocoma mollissima include its potential to alleviate symptoms of eczema, acne, and other skin conditions, as well as its ability to reduce fever and promote wound healing. Eriocoma mollissima can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
